sourcesContent:
import React from 'react' import '../styles/tourdetails.css' import { Container,Row,Col,Form,ListGroup } from 'reactstrap'; import {useParams} from 'react-router-dom'; import tourData from '../assets/data/tours' import calculateAvgRating from '../utils/avgrating'; const TourDetails = () => { const {id}=useParams(); //this is static data later we will call our API and load our data from database. const tour=tourData.find(tour=> tour.id === id); //destructure properties from tour object const {photo, title, desc, price , address, reviews, city, distance, maxGroupSize }=tour const{totalRating,avgRating}=calculateAvgRating(reviews); return (

{title}

{calculateAvgRating === 0 ? null :avgRating} {totalRating === 0 ?( 'Not rated' ) :( ({reviews.length}) ) }
{city} ${price}/per person {maxGroupSize}
Description

{desc}

{/*--------tour reviews------*/}

Reviews ({reviews?.length} reviews)

1 2 3 4 5
) } export default TourDetails
